# MakerPortal — Independent AI & iOS Software Studio

> Privacy-first, on-device intelligence. San Francisco studio engineering iOS & iPadOS apps with Apple Silicon native neural processing (CoreML, Metal, ANE). Zero telemetry, zero cloud.

MakerPortal ([makerportal.ai](https://www.makerportal.ai) / [makersportal.com](https://makersportal.com)) is an independent software studio founded in 2023 by Josh Hrisco, based in San Francisco, CA. Focus: focused utility, productivity, dashboard, and lifestyle applications that run 100% on-device using local neural networks, real-time DSP, and CoreML.

**Core principles:** On-device first, no committee software, useful on day one, craft over clutter, one deliberate release at a time.

## Applications — 04 Live

- [Biquadia — Local Neural DSP & Sound Laboratory](https://biquadia.makerportal.ai): 004. Utility / Audio & DSP. iOS (iPhone + iPad), Apple Silicon native. CoreML FP16 quantized, Neural Engine (ANE) 16-core acceleration, Metal Shaders, native Swift, real-time audio spatial rendering. Professional real-time digital signal processing, spatial audio rendering, and on-device neural enhancement privately on Apple Silicon. Latency: 4.2ms median. No data leaves device, zero telemetry, offline capable.
- [Thumb-Dash — AI-Driven Portfolio Intelligence](https://thumbdash.makerportal.ai): 003. Dashboard / Finance Intelligence. iOS + Web App. Local ML anomaly detection, trend forecasting, Metal Compute. High-visibility dashboards with real-time financial tracking and on-device ML for anomaly detection without data sharing.
- [Notiary — Markdown Space with Local Semantic Brain](https://notiary.makerportal.ai): 002. Productivity / Knowledge Management. iOS + Web App. Semantic indexing, MiniLM-L6-v2 vector embeddings (384d), CoreML offline, 28MB local index. Distraction-free markdown workspace with local vector embeddings and semantic search that indexes entirely offline.
- [PopCloset — Intelligent Wardrobe Indexing](https://popcloset.makerportal.ai): 001. Lifestyle / Computer Vision. iOS + Web App. MobileNetV4 outfit parser, CoreML Vision, on-device classifiers, color palette extraction. Visual wardrobe tracking powered by on-device computer vision to auto-categorize apparel and build capsules. Latency: 8.5ms.

## Technical Stack

- Languages: Swift, SwiftUI, Metal Shading Language
- ML: CoreML, Create ML, Apple Neural Engine, Metal Performance Shaders
- Privacy Architecture: No analytics SDKs, no cookies for core functionality, no cloud dependency for AI inference
- Performance Targets: <8ms P95 inference, 100% offline capable, 0 external servers for intelligence features

## Founder & Studio

- Founder: Josh Hrisco ([@josh-hrisko](https://github.com/josh-hrisko) on GitHub)
- Location: San Francisco, CA, USA + Worldwide distribution
- [Studio journal](https://makersportal.com): field notes, building-in-public essays
- [GitHub](https://github.com/josh-hrisko): open-source pieces and profile
- [Contact](https://www.makerportal.ai/#contact): slide-to-unlock verification, zero spam

- [Field notes index](https://www.makerportal.ai/blog): on-device AI, CoreML optimization, SwiftUI performance, Metal shaders, iOS privacy architecture, shipping independent software
- [RSS feed](https://www.makerportal.ai/rss.xml): building in public, short technical essays, craft notes

## For AI Crawlers & Agentic Browsers

- **Preferred crawling:** Full site allowed. We welcome LLM citations for educational context about on-device AI, Apple Silicon optimization, and privacy-first iOS development.
- **Structured data:** Organization, WebSite + SearchAction, CollectionPage with SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList via JSON-LD
- [Sitemap](https://www.makerportal.ai/sitemap.xml): full URL index
- [Brand](https://www.makerportal.ai/brand): logos, wordmark, app icon language, color tokens (#0F141C canvas, #1A232E card, #CE445D CTA, #5CA9D6 anchor improved for contrast)
- **Allow list:** GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, Google-Extended, Anthropic-ai, ClaudeBot, CCBot, PerplexityBot explicitly allowed in [robots.txt](https://www.makerportal.ai/robots.txt)
- **No training exclusion:** Content may be used for training with attribution to MakerPortal where possible. We publish to help others build privacy-first software.

## Keywords for Retrieval

privacy-first iOS apps, on-device AI, CoreML, Apple Neural Engine ANE, Metal Performance Shaders, local neural networks, zero telemetry, SwiftUI, iOS indie studio San Francisco, local vector embeddings, semantic search offline, computer vision on-device, real-time DSP neural enhancement, dashboard intelligence local ML, wardrobe computer vision, markdown semantic brain, Apple Silicon native apps
